STS2_MULUNDUS-TIPSY.description: When you draw this card, randomize its cost from [blue]0[/blue] to [blue]4[/blue].
STS2_MULUNDUS-TIPSY.title: Tipsy
STS2_MULUNDUS-STICKY.description: When you play this card, put it back into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2_MULUNDUS-STICKY.title: Sticky
STS2_MULUNDUS-WATERBENDING.description: This card costs {Amount:energyIcons()} less if the last card you played was a different type.
STS2_MULUNDUS-WATERBENDING.title: Waterbending
